text:
In the first space, I feel a sense of sterility and detachment. The glass walls and minimalist furniture create an atmosphere of clarity, yet also isolation. It makes me ponder the boundaries we erect between ourselves and the outside world—even in our most collaborative spaces.

Entering the R+D showcase, I am invigorated by the colors and the bold text. The celebration of research and development here feels almost like a temple to human ingenuity. Yet, I sense a subtle tension: innovation is presented as both a promise and a challenge. I feel curious but also contemplative, reminded of our responsibility when shaping futures with technology.
